attributes.action: Provide dedicated support for Military Kids when parents leave the Armed Forces
attributes.additional_details:
Children in military families serve in their own way through constant change and sacrifice. When a parent leaves the Armed Forces, they should not be left to navigate one of the biggest transitions of their lives without support.

Recognising and supporting military children during this time will help them build stability, confidence, and a stronger future.
attributes.background: Military children face major life changes when a parent leaves the Armed Forces. This can include moving, losing their support network and being put in hard situations as their parents also navigate this change. Despite this, they receive little support during this difficult transition.

rejection.details: I'm afraid we don't find your petition clear enough - we don't really know what sort of support you may be referring to in your text.  If you feel oyu can set out your request with more clarity then please do start a new petition.
